articles.content: The U.S. Justice Department charged Google software engineer Michele Spagnuolo with insider trading, alleging the employee made $1.2 million trading on Polymarket based on confidential business infor… [+2369 chars]

articles.title: Why Google’s AI can’t spell Google (or anything else) - TechCrunch
articles.content:
How many Ps are in Google? According to Google, there are two.
